content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed two changes: (1) bead ID canonicalization in selection (run.rs:589-590) ensures controller always stores qualified-form bead IDs, and (2) replay guard in success_reconciliation.rs (lines 164-178, 256, 492-518) prevents crashes when reconciliation replays after the controller has already advanced to the next bead. Both changes are correct, well-tested (new tests at run.rs:2279-2314 and success_reconciliation.rs:2418-2637), and all 652 lib tests pass. The replay guard correctly detects advancement by comparing active_bead_id against the reconciling bead_id, and skips controller state transitions plus next-bead selection on replay. The bead ID format consistency is maintained because task_source.bead_id (used in production reconciliation) originates from the same controller active_bead_id that was canonicalized. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
